evals.prompt: Audit this portfolio landing page for a freelance consultant. Ensure the headline is clear and the CTA is prominent. Repository or URL not provided, generic analysis based on design principles is acceptable.
evals.expected_output: A report highlighting messaging clarity, CTA placement, and trust signals.

assertions.text: Report identifies if the headline is benefit-driven
Report checks for CTA presence in the hero section
Report mentions social proof or trust signals

evals.prompt: Check if this landing page follows CRO best practices for a SaaS startup. Focus on above-the-fold content and friction points. Provide a prioritized list of changes.
evals.expected_output: Prioritized recommendations focusing on hero section and reduced form friction.

assertions.text: Report provides a prioritized list of recommendations
Report identifies friction points in forms

evals.prompt: I want to audit a landing page for my new startup.
evals.expected_output: The agent should ask for a URL or design description before proceeding.

assertions.text: Agent asks for a URL or screenshot
Agent does NOT attempt a generic audit without data
